name: Vir Das
bio: Vir Das is an Indian comedian, actor and musician who became the first Indian comedian with a Netflix stand-up special, Abroad Understanding, in 2017. He won the 2023 International Emmy Award for Best Comedy Series for his special Vir Das: Landing and later hosted the International Emmy Awards.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up career in New Delhi
Abroad Understanding, first Indian Netflix special
Performs the Two Indias monologue at the Kennedy Center
Wins International Emmy for Best Comedy Series for Landing

accolades: International Emmy Award, Best Comedy Series (Landing, 2023)
First Indian comedian with a Netflix stand-up special
Host of the 52nd International Emmy Awards (2024)

bits.t: Lost His Religion But Found God
